geographic_restrictions: Crawford, Erie, Lawrence, Mercer, Venango, and Warren counties in Pennsylvania
project_area: Creative industries including marketing, architecture, visual arts & crafts, design, film & media, digital games, music & entertainment, and publishing
demographic_requirements: Creative entrepreneurs aged 18+ with gross revenue under $200,000, operating or intending to form a for-profit business in eligible creative industries
eligibility_summary: Open to Pennsylvania residents aged 18+ in Crawford, Erie, Lawrence, Mercer, Venango, and Warren counties. Applicants must have gross revenue under $200,000, a business plan, and valid licenses/permits. Previous recipients must wait 3 years to reapply. Funds must support business growth and cannot be used for religious activities, lobbying, or regular operating costs.
